raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing multiple unauthorized credit card transactions that Citi has incorrectly determined were authorized. 

The transactions occurred onXX/XX/XXXX 2026 and consisted primarily of multiple XX/XX/XXXX purchases across numerousXX/XX/XXXX locations, along with XXXX XXXX transactions in XXXX XXXX,XX/XX/XXXX 

The attached transaction records show a clear and consistent pattern of fraudulent activity, including repeated charges of similar amounts at multiple XXXX stores in different XX/XX/XXXX cities within a short timeframe. Additional XXXX XXXX charges occurred during the same period in XX/XX/XXXX. 

It is not possible for legitimate transactions to occur across these geographically distant locations within this timeframe. 

I reported these transactions to Citi as fraud. Citi denied the claim and stated that the transactions were made using my mobile device. 

I dispute Citis conclusion. 

Citi has not provided any evidence demonstrating that the device used was my device. The use of a digital wallet or tokenized payment method does not establish that the device belonged to me or was under my control. 

The transaction pattern itself contradicts Citis conclusion. 

I am requesting that Citi : * Reopen the investigation * Provide the specific evidence supporting its determination, including the Device Account Number ( token ), device identification, and provisioning details * Reverse all unauthorized charges
